## Safety checklist

- [ ] No autonomous destructive writes introduced
- [ ] Write tools remain gated by human approval (or N/A)
- [ ] Secrets are not hardcoded or logged
- [ ] Retrieved/untrusted content is not treated as instructions (or N/A)
